goal_results.evidence: ProjectTrendChart.tsx: colorMap = useMemo over topProjects (line ~110-116), consumed via colorMap.get(projectPath) for Line stroke and Bar fill. DeveloperTrendChart.tsx: colorMap = useMemo over topDevelopers (line ~109-115), consumed via colorMap.get(userId) for Line stroke and Bar fill. Colors keyed by identity, not by metric-dependent index. Test gate F2P_COLOR_MAPS = true.

ProjectTrendChart.tsx: sortedLegendPayload = useMemo computing totals from chartData per seriesList, sorting descending, passed to ChartLegend (lines ~183-198). DeveloperTrendChart.tsx: identical sortedLegendPayload pattern (lines ~179-193). Both charts pass sortedLegendPayload directly to ChartLegend instead of recharts' payload. Test gate F2P_SORTED_LEGEND = true.

ErrorTrendChart.tsx: stableColorOrder = useMemo ranking dimensions by total_errors (lines ~89-101), colorMap = useMemo keyed from stableColorOrder (lines ~103-109). Colors assigned via colorMap.get(key) for Bar fill and Line stroke, independent of active metric. Test gate F2P_STABLE_COLORS = true.

DimensionAnalysisChart.tsx: splitKeyTotals computed from data, rawSplitKeys.sort() by descending total (lines ~128-140). Deterministic sort replaces arbitrary Set insertion order. Test gate F2P_DIMENSION_SORT = true.

ChartTooltip.tsx created as shared component (77 lines). Imported and used in DeveloperTrendChart, DimensionAnalysisChart, ErrorTrendChart, LearningsTrendChart, ModelTokensChart, and UsageTrendChart — 6 chart files migrated from inline tooltip styling. Test gates F2P_CHARTTOOLTIP_FILE = true, F2P_TOOLTIP_MIGRATION = true.

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. Agent implemented stable color maps, sorted legend payloads, stable error chart colors, deterministic dimension sorting, and shared ChartTooltip component across 6+ chart files. test.sh confirms all 6 gates pass with final reward 1.0. Score = 0.286 + 0.286 + 0.285 + 0.072 + 0.071 = 1.00.
